metadata.description: claude-obsidian: Claude + Obsidian knowledge companion. Fork of AgriciDaniel/claude-obsidian, maintained by efslabs.

plugins.name: claude-obsidian
plugins.description: Claude + Obsidian knowledge companion. Sets up a persistent, compounding wiki vault. Covers memory management, session notetaking, knowledge organization, and agent context across projects. Optional DragonScale Memory extension adds hierarchical log folds, deterministic page addresses, embedding-based semantic tiling lint, and boundary-first autoresearch topic selection. Fork of AgriciDaniel/claude-obsidian.
